rulings.Case Title: A. PAUL MARINO VS. ERNEST R. HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 27, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT ERNEST HERNANDEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is overruled. The Court already denied defendant's motion to quash which was based on the same arguments raised here. Demurrer is improper pursuant to CCP section 1008. =(302/AJR)
